title: brachyscome perpusilla var. tenella
intro: Brachyscome perpusilla var. tenella, commonly known as the low daisy or small white daisy, is a perennial herb native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Brachyscome perpusilla var. tenella are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
